sentences.arabic: زَارَتْ سَارَةُ الْمَدِينَةَ الْقَدِيمَةَ لِتُشَاهِدَ الْآثَارَ التَّارِيخِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Sara je posjetila stari grad kako bi vidjela istorijske spomenike.
sentences.translationEn: Sara visited the old city to see the historical monuments.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَتْ خَرِيطَةً سِيَاحِيَّةً لِتَعْرِفَ مَوَاقِعَ الْمَتَاحِفِ وَالْمَسَاجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Koristila je turističku kartu da sazna lokacije muzeja i džamija.
sentences.translationEn: She used a tourist map to find the locations of museums and mosques.

sentences.arabic: الْتَقَطَتْ صُوَرًا كَثِيرَةً لِلْمَبَانِي الْجَمِيلَةِ وَالشَّوَارِعِ الضَّيِّقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Napravila je mnogo fotografija lijepih zgrada i uskih ulica.
sentences.translationEn: She took many photos of the beautiful buildings and narrow streets.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ لِأَصْدِقَائِهَا مِنَ السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kupila je suvenire za svoje prijatelje na narodnoj pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: She bought some souvenirs for her friends from the traditional market.

sentences.translation: Vrijeme je bilo sunčano i divno za šetnju.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was sunny and wonderful for wandering around.
